overview.description: HR and workforce management is evolving with AI-powered recruiting, employee analytics, and workforce planning. Vietnam's large manufacturing and service workforce creates unique challenges for at-scale HR automation.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$500M HRTech market; 55M workforce; high turnover in manufacturing and retail
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$4B HRTech market; talent analytics and automated screening growing fast

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Medium — enterprise HR systems have good coverage; SME data fragmented
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Low to medium — fragmented across spreadsheets and legacy HRMS

painPoints.problem: High-volume resume screening is slow and biased without AI assistance
Employee churn prediction in high-turnover industries is reactive
Skills gap analysis and learning path recommendation is manual

relatedNodes.description: HR and EdTech share skills assessment, upskilling, and learning path design.
